title: Pack of 4 Pairs Red Pvc Coated Gloves Size Large - Elasticated Cuffs for Comfort, Tear Resistant | Diy Health & Safety Work Gloves, Flexible & Comfy
features: ✔️ PREMIUM QUALITY - The ergonomically shaped reusable work gloves are made of PVC, offer high resistance to chemicals, alkali, solvent, and mechanical risks, also can be used a long time at work no fracturing, become hard, oil impregnate and more.

✔️ HIGH PERFORMANCE - MStay safe while working with these NTI brand red PVC rubber safety builders work gloves. Designed for protective construction and DIY projects, these gloves provide excellent protection against punctures, cuts, and other hazards. The gloves are made of high-quality materials and are suitable for a wide range of applications.

✔️ DIY - Whether you are a professional builder or a DIY enthusiast, these gloves are a must-have for any job that involves construction or renovation. They are perfect for protecting your hands from injury and are easy to wear and remove. So why wait? Get your hands on these protective gloves today and stay safe on the job!
description: BRAND NEW! HIGH QUALITY Size: Large Hard wearing and durable Excellent comfort and fit Made from the highest quality rubber Cotton cuff for additional support and comfort
